sections.heading: 1. Purpose
sections.text: Use this runbook to coordinate the first response to an incident.

sections.heading: 2. Escalation path
sections.mermaid:
flowchart TD
A[Incident] --> B{Severity}
B -->|High| C[Page on-call]
B -->|Low| D[Create follow-up]

sections.heading: Warning: Preserve evidence
sections.text: Do not delete logs or restart systems until evidence has been captured.
